name: Cell Division & Structure of Chromosomes
description: Mitosis and Meiosis phases, chromosome structure, DNA double helix basic concept.

name: Genetics: Mendel's Laws
description: Monohybrid and dihybrid crosses, sex-linked inheritance (haemophilia, color blindness).

name: Absorption by Roots
description: Imbibition, diffusion, osmosis, turgidity, plasmolysis, active transport, and root hair structure.

name: Transpiration
description: Mechanism, stomatal and cuticular transpiration, factors affecting rate, Ganong's potometer.

name: Photosynthesis
description: Light and Dark reactions, factors, carbon cycle, experiments demonstrating necessity of light, CO2, chlorophyll.

name: Chemical Coordination: Endocrine System
description: Hormones from Adrenal, Thyroid, Pituitary, and Pancreas. Hypo and hyper-secretion states.

name: Circulatory System
description: Structure of heart, double circulation, blood vessels, composition of blood and lymph, clotting mechanism.

name: Excretory System
description: Structure of kidney, nephron, urine formation, ultrafiltration, selective reabsorption, and osmoregulation.

name: Nervous System
description: Brain structures (cerebrum, cerebellum, medulla oblongata), spinal cord, reflex arc, and structure of eye and ear.

name: Reproductive System & Population
description: Male and female systems, menstrual cycle, fertilization, population explosion, control methods.
